title: HealthRBDistance Statement
description: Calculates and displays the driving (rotation) amount of the motor of the specified joint in robot operation from HealthRBStart to HealthRBStop.  The past usage is not considered.
notes:
- This command does not function in Auto mode.

- This command does not function in dry run mode.
see_also: Displays the driving (rotation) amount of the motor of the specified joint.
